person.name: Margaret ferch Gruffudd
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
«b»Biography«/b»
Margery was the daughter Gruffydd (aka Griffin) ap Madog and Emma de Aldithley. She married Sir John de Arderne, son of Sir Peter de Arderne and Margery, about 1281. Proof of this marriage was found by Ormerod in a Cheshire Domesday Roll Calendar of Enrollments: "46. Enrollment of grant by Peter de Arderne, Lord of Aldford, to John his eldest son, and Margaret his wife, daughter of the Lord Griffin of Bromfeld, of the entire manor of Congleton. A Note is added, that the said Peter de Arderne had to wife Margaret, mother of the said John."

«b»Children:«/b»
1.) Cicely Arderne

2.) Agnes de Arderne

3.) Margery Arderne d. a 1318

4.) Sir John Arderne d. c 1349

5.) Peter Arderne d. b 1359

sibling.name: Gruffydd Fychan ap Gruffydd Lord Glyndwrdwy

zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret ferch Gruffudd於大約1261年出生在威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾時，她的父親Gruffydd Maelor II ap Madog67歲，母親Emma de Audley42歲。她和Sir Knt. John d'Arderne I至少有3個兒子和6個女兒。她去世於1314年6月3日在英國爾阿爾德福德享年54歲。

nameMeanings.name: ferch

meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Gruffudd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Griffith
meanings: Welsh (Carmarthenshire and western England): from the Old Welsh personal name Gruffudd, Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, composed of the elements grip, of uncertain significance, + iud ‘chief, lord’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret ferch Gruffudd was born about 1261, in Montgomeryshire, Wales, her father, Gruffydd Maelor II ap Madog, was 67 and her mother, Emma de Audley, was 42. She had at least 3 sons and 6 daughters with Sir Knt. John d'Arderne I. She died on 3 June 1314, in Aldford, Cheshire, England, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret ferch Gruffudd est née environ 1261, à Montgomeryshire, Galles, son père, Gruffydd Maelor II ap Madog, avait 67 ans et sa mère, Emma de Audley, avait 42 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles avec Sir Knt. John d'Arderne I. Elle est décédée le 3 juin 1314, à Aldford, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret ferch Gruffudd um 1261 in Montgomeryshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gruffydd Maelor II ap Madog 67 und ihre Mutter Emma de Audley 42. Sie hatte mit Sir Knt. John d'Arderne I mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. Juni 1314 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Aldford, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret ferch Gruffudd è nata il circa 1261 nel Montgomeryshire, Galles, sua padre, Gruffydd Maelor II ap Madog, aveva 67 anni e sua madre, Emma de Audley, aveva 42 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie con Sir Knt. John d'Arderne I. Morì il 3 giugno 1314, nel Aldford, Cheshire, England, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret ferch Gruffuddが約1261年にウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアで生まれた時，父Gruffydd Maelor II ap Madogは67歳，母Emma de Audleyは42歳であった。彼女はSir Knt. John d'Arderne Iとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1314年6月3日にイギリスチェシュアイアアルドフォードで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret ferch Gruffudd(이)가 대략 1261년 웨일스 몽고머이실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gruffydd Maelor II ap Madog(은)는 67세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Emma de Audley(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 Sir Knt. John d'Arderne I(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1314년 6월 3일 영국 체실르 알드퍼드에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret ferch Gruffudd nasceu aproximadamente 1261, em Montgomeryshire, Gales, seu pai, Gruffydd Maelor II ap Madog, tinha 67 anos e sua mãe, Emma de Audley, tinha 42 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas com Sir Knt. John d'Arderne I. Ela faleceu em 3 de junho de 1314, em Aldford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret ferch Gruffudd родилась около 1261 г. в местности монтгомиришир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Gruffydd Maelor II ap Madog было 67 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma de Audley, 42. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей от Sir Knt. John d'Arderne I. Она умерла 3 июня 1314 г. в местности алдфорд, чешир, Англия в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret ferch Gruffudd nació aproximadamente 1261, en Montgomeryshire, Gales, su papá, Gruffydd Maelor II ap Madog, tenía 67 años y su mamá, Emma de Audley, tenía 42 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas con Sir Knt. John d'Arderne I. Murió el 3 de junio de 1314, en Aldford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 54 años.
